descriptionHtml:
Dufour 445 GL For Sale 2012 | Guest Cabins:4 | guest bathrooms:3

Engine Hours approx 4000 Only!!

If you are looking for a well‑kept cruising yacht with proven comfort and capability, this Dufour 445 GL For Sale 2012 is a very appealing option. Designed by Felci and built by the respected Dufour shipyard, she offers a balanced combination of performance, interior volume and easy handling. This particular 2012 example has had only two owners, has been looked after with care, and is presented in good condition.

(solar panels, bimini, Autopilot, AIS )

Specifications

• Yard: Dufour
• Model: Dufour 445 GL
• Designer: Felci
• Flag: Italian
• Year: 2012
• Length overall: 13.50 m
• Beam: 4.35 m
• Draft: 1.75 m
• Displacement: 11,000 kg
• Owners: 2
• Capacity: 12 people
• Location: Lazio

Deck and Hull
• Hull material: GRP
• Sprayhood: yes, grey, 2023 + extra protective cover
• Bimini: yes
• Cockpit table: yes

Interior
• Double cabins: 2
• Twin cabins: 2
• Dinette berths: 1
• Bathrooms: 3
• Cooker: 3 burners
• Oven: yes
• Fridge: top‑loading with lower compartment
• Notes: galley refurbished 2024, white upholstery

Engine and Propulsion
• Engine: 1 Volvo Penta D2‑55F
• Power: 55 hp
• Fuel: diesel
• Year: 2012
• Hours: approx. 4,000 (Jan 2026)
• Fuel tank: 270 L
• Transmission: s‑drive
• Propeller: Autoprop
• Steering: wheel + cover
• Notes: annual servicing

Electronics
• Autopilot: yes
• VHF: yes
• Log: yes
• Tridata: yes
• Compass: yes
• Stereo: yes
• Plotter: yes
• Wind instrument: yes
• Notes: autopilot remote control, AIS Raymarine

Systems
• Voltage: 12V
• Batteries: 5 (4 x 120A service + 1 x 120A engine)
• Water tanks: 2
• Total water capacity: 500 L
• Tank material: plastic
• Bilge pumps: 2
• Battery charger: yes
• Boiler: yes
• Freshwater pump: yes
• Black water system: yes
• External shower: yes
• Notes: solar panels on bimini

Sails and Rigging
• Mast: aluminium
• Winches: 4 Lewmar
• Lazy bag: yes
• Vang: yes
• Furling genoa: yes
• Notes: mainsail 2023, lazy bag 2023, genoa original

Mooring and Safety
• Tender: yes
• Outboard: yes
• Windlass: yes
• Anchor: yes
• Chain: yes
• Mooring lines: yes
• Life raft: yes
• Fenders: 12

Overall, this Dufour 445 GL For Sale 2012 represents a practical and capable cruising yacht that has been maintained in good condition and offers a well-rounded package for those seeking comfort and reliability on the water.
